title: The Sunny Faces Big Mom's Ship
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the sunny faces big mom's ship, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Marines, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo, Law, Luffy, and the Sunny team are pulled into separate crises as Dressrosa's power structure tightens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I fear that although your party treated me with kindness earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I must now bite the hand that fed me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Such are the workings of fate....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The man with Dofla- Mingo is a....!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: A Marine Admiral, that he is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Here's an Admiral on dressroSA right now!!?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Could Doflamingo be allied with the Marines!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If that's the case, then we're up against far more enemies than expected!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: How are both of you flying!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Do you still draw breath!!? Please respond!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: We'll talk more at the Palace, Fujitora!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: If you coop- crate with me, I will give you these brats' heads.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ...I'll listen to what you have to say, Tenyasha, but... After that, I'll be making a decision.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Let's get out of here, for now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy!!! Hurry up and find an exit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: We'll be running around in this area!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Let's hurry, Tara-Man's "voice" hasn't disappeared yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: What is it now!!? That's Brook's Group!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Why is a yonkou's ship here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: I don't know, but those two we met at fishman Island are here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: MAMA!! We've confirmed that Caesar is here, Roar!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: As we thought, they've had him all along, Bon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: For the time being, we'll sink the ship and pull up only Caesar de soir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Luffy!! This is because you picked a fight with her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: You're quite a popular guy, huh, you evil scien- list!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: I suppose that's just another ship come to rescue you!!?

summary: The Sunny Faces Big Mom's Ship focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Marines, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as doflamingo, Law, Luffy, and the Sunny team are pulled into separate crises as Dressrosa's power structure tightens.
